products.name: Aura Smart lock
features:
Face Unlock & Fingerprint access — super fast and secure.
AI anti-spoofing protects against fake attempts.
Control your door remotely via mobile app.
Backup fingerprint sensor for extra safety.
Real-time notifications keep you updated.

products.name: Altro Smart Door Lock
features: Control and manage your smart door lock remotely using your smartphone or tablet.
Send digital keys and temporary codes to guests.
